title: agrostis scabra var. perennans
intro: Agrostis scabra var. perennans, also known as bent grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Agrostis scabra var. perennans include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of colds and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
